name: propionate
summary: propionate is tracked for short- chain fatty acid activating FFAR2/3, improving insulin sensitivity and satiety signaling; short- chain fatty acid with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence.
